options.command: cd apps/api-auth && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && cd ../..
cd apps/api-auth && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && cd ../..
cd apps/api-auth && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts && cd ../..

cd apps/api-auth && docker compose up -d && until pg_isready -h localhost -p 5435 -U postgres; do sleep 1; done && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate dev --config=prisma/prisma.config.ts && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
